/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/commands/draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/commands/exctract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/commands/saveLoad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/commands/simplify.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/dataStructure/graphUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/dataStructure/weightedGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/osm/filtering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/osm/positionedGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/osm/xml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/osmGraph.dir/src/utils/pathUtils.cpp.o -o /Users/lenafournier/Desktop/IMAC/IMAC1/ProgAlgo/S2-Prog-Algo-TD/TD7/osmGraph/bin/Debug/osmGraph  _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL _deps/pugixml-build/libpugixml.a -framework OpenGL -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework CoreFoundation
